headline: Academic Freedom Violations at 6 Universities Documented by Scholars at Risk
context: Scholars at Risk Network documented 6 incidents of academic freedom restriction at Malaysian universities in 2025.

cards.big: 6 documented academic freedom violations at Malaysian universities in 2025 alone
cards.sub: Cases include research censorship event cancellations and disciplinary threats

cards.big: 3 academics reported being pressured to remove government-critical findings from papers
cards.sub: Self-censorship is widespread but formal cases represent only visible incidents

cards.big: AUKU Section 16B restricts faculty from making public statements without approval
cards.sub: Legal framework enables institutional suppression of academic speech

cards.big: Academic Freedom Index 2025 ranks Malaysia at 0.38 out of 1.0 below Indonesia at 0.52
cards.sub: Neighboring democracies provide stronger protections for university scholars

cards.big: Research that must pass political approval tests is not scholarship—it is propaganda
Should AUKU be amended to explicitly protect academic freedom of expression
